meaning: 马略卡岛[西班牙东部](巴利阿里群岛中的最大岛)
examples: I was in Mallorca last week.
The vase is a liquor bottle from Mallorca.
Customerswait in a busy shop in a market in Palma, Mallorca.
The defeat relegated second bottom Deportivo, while Mallorca also went down despite winning 4-2 against Valladolid.
In Spain, Mallorca moved into fourth spot in La Liga after beating Osasuna 2-0.
